return(function(Q,F,o,N,G,e,a,g,M,y,j,T,u,H,k,r,S,C,m,c,B,d,U,J,D)j,u,g,C,H,T,M,d,y,U,D,c,k,r,m,B,J,S=function(Q,P)local F=U(P)local o=function(o)return J(Q,{o},P,F)end return o end,function(Q,P)local
